utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. The total_budget includes both a monthly and an annual cost breakdown. All items are fully detailed as required.
